question: What are the two distinct powers of a Draconian 'Fire-Heart' gem?

answers.original:
Fire-Heart gems generate Molten-Streams of liquid fire and produce Heat-Shields, protective barriers of superheated air.

### References

- [1] Fire-Heart gems generate Molten-Streams of liquid fire.
- [2] Fire-Heart gems produce Heat-Shields, protective barriers of superheated air.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

entities.name: Fire-Heart Gem
entities.description: Fire-Heart gems are Draconian artifacts capable of generating Molten-Streams and Heat-Shields, found only in active volcano cores.

entities.name: Crimson Glow
entities.description: Fire-Heart gems pulse with an internal crimson glow.

entities.name: Molten-Streams
entities.description: Molten-Streams are streams of liquid fire generated by Fire-Heart gems, reaching temperatures of several thousand degrees.
